g.text: 01 / API KEYCHAIN
Unified LLM gateway across eight inference networks, with encrypted credential storage and one consistent provider interface.
Tracks requests and usage analytics while protecting API keys with AES-256-GCM encryption.
NEXT.JS · TYPESCRIPT · FASTAPI · PYTHON · SUPABASE · SECURITY
02 / PROPOSALOS
AI-assisted RFP discovery and response platform built at Ambian Strategy from the initial architecture onward.
Collects opportunities from 11+ procurement portals, scores business fit, and reduces response work from days to hours.
NEXT.JS · FASTAPI · PYTHON · SUPABASE · SCRAPING · AI FIT-SCORING
03 / KERN
Keyboard-driven personal data OS with schema-flexible JSONB storage and connected views for information and workflows.
Integrates GitHub, Notion, calendars, Linear and RSS, then exposes personal data through an MCP server.
REACT · TYPESCRIPT · POSTGRESQL · SUPABASE · JSONB · MCP
04 / COSMOS
Terminal-native AI chatbot with a rich keyboard-first interface, file attachments, Markdown output and conversation history.
Provides access to 25+ language models through OpenRouter without forcing developers to leave the terminal.
PYTHON · TEXTUAL · OPENROUTER · TUI · CLI
05 / HALLUCINATION SUPPRESSION
Research pipeline combining confidence scoring, named-entity routing, Wikidata evidence retrieval and contradiction checks.
Uses RoBERTa natural-language inference and explores a blockchain audit layer for traceable verification results.
PYTHON · TRANSFORMERS · NLP · WIKIDATA · ROBERTA · BLOCKCHAIN · SRIP 2026
06 / LANDROID
Land-intelligence workflow for drone-captured orthomosaic GeoTIFF imagery, delivered through a cross-platform client.
Derives NDVI insights, plant-health zones, tree counts and map overlays from geospatial source data.
FLUTTER · FASTAPI · PYTHON · SUPABASE · POSTGIS · GEOTIFF
07 / STUDENT DASHBOARD
Unified academic workspace for VIT students that replaces scattered information with one practical daily interface.
Combines attendance tracking, timetable access and planning tools around common student workflows.
REACT · NODE.JS · TYPESCRIPT · POSTGRESQL · ACADEMIC TOOLS
08 / ARBOR
Visual problem-solving environment where each problem becomes a navigable hierarchy of tasks and sub-problems.
Supports decomposition, backtracking and AI-assisted reasoning through an interactive node-based canvas.
REACT · TYPESCRIPT · REACT FLOW · OPENAI API · INTERACTION DESIGN
09 / NOTIONWIDGETS
Native iOS app that turns Notion databases into configurable home-screen widgets for frequently checked information.
Designed for schedules, tasks and academic events, with WidgetKit rendering and smart database filtering.
SWIFT · SWIFTUI · WIDGETKIT · NOTION API · IOS
10 / PLANNER
Native productivity planner focused on clear task scheduling, deadlines and prioritization without interface clutter.
Uses persistent local data and SwiftUI components to provide a responsive, platform-consistent planning experience.
SWIFT · SWIFTUI · CORE DATA · IOS
11 / LOBE
Personal knowledge OS that brings thoughts, projects and life administration into one connected web workspace.
Combines rich documents, databases, calendars, kanban boards and a visual map of connected information.
TYPESCRIPT · REACT · POSTGRESQL · KNOWLEDGE SYSTEMS
12 / BILLING SYSTEM
Full-stack billing and inventory platform with dynamic customer sales, multi-product invoices and reusable templates.
Uses a flexible JSONB schema and JWT authorization across admin, franchise and cashier role boundaries.
NODE.JS · EXPRESS · TYPESCRIPT · POSTGRESQL · JSONB · JWT
13 / TERMINALTYPE
Monkeytype-inspired terminal typing test designed for developers who prefer fast, keyboard-only tools.
Calculates words per minute and accuracy in real time, provides immediate feedback and installs through Homebrew.
JAVASCRIPT · NODE.JS · TUI · CLI · HOMEBREW
14 / FINSIGHT AI
AI-assisted fintech project developed for the ArcNight 2026 hackathon to make portfolio information easier to interpret.
Explores conversational financial analysis and portfolio intelligence through a focused web interface.
PYTHON · NEXT.JS · AI · FINTECH · ARCNIGHT 2026
15 / COURSE & MODULE RECOGNITION
Document-processing utility that identifies courses and modules by extracting structured codes from institutional files.
Automates repetitive academic-document classification and converts unstructured source material into usable records.
PYTHON · DOCUMENT PARSING · DATA EXTRACTION · AUTOMATION
